title: Trump's Greenland envoy faces uphill battle on mission to make 'friends'
summary_full: Jeff Landry's visit to the territory, a semi-autonomous part of Denmark, has touched a nerve among some Greenlanders.
summary_public: Jeff Landry's visit to the territory, a semi-autonomous part of Denmark, has touched a nerve among some Greenlanders.
